---
id: get-device-definition-numeric
title: "查询单设备定义（数字 ID 形态）"
description: "供内部 AqaraLife App 使用。与 `GET /devices/definitions` 表示**同类**设备能力信息，但本接口用另一套**树形 JSON**："
sidebar_label: "查询单设备定义（数字 ID 形态）"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: i18n/zh/docusaurus-plugin-content-docs/version-Beta/aqara-developer/aiot-api/aiot-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"查询单设备定义（数字 ID 形态）"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/devices/definitions/numeric"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



供内部 AqaraLife App 使用。与 `GET /devices/definitions` 表示**同类**设备能力信息，但本接口用另一套**树形 JSON**：
`devices[] → eps（端点）→ funcs（功能簇 ID）→ traits / cmds`，其中 **trait、command、function、endpoint 均以整型 ID** 标识；
具体读写值在 `traits[].args[]`、`cmds[].args[]` 中，`value` 多为字符串（含 JSON 文本、数字字符串等），`time` 为毫秒时间戳（可选）。
`data` 还会出现 `centralGateway`、`userId`、`nid`、`spaceId` 等上下文字段。单设备：`query deviceId`（即 did）。


<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"name":"Accesstoken","in":"header","required":false,"schema":{"type":"string","example":"{{Accesstoken}}"},"description":"通过授权获取的访问 Token。"},{"name":"Appid","in":"header","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","example":"{{Appid}}"},"description":"在 [Aqara 开发者平台](https://developer.aqara.com/) 创建应用时分配的 App ID。"},{"name":"Keyid","in":"header","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","example":"{{Keyid}}"},"description":"在 [Aqara 开发者平台](https://developer.aqara.com/) 创建应用时分配的 Key ID。"},{"name":"Nonce","in":"header","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","example":"{{Nonce}}"},"description":"随机字符串，每次请求都不同。"},{"name":"Time","in":"header","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","example":"{{Time}}"},"description":"请求时间戳，单位毫秒。"},{"name":"Sign","in":"header","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","example":"{{Sign}}"},"description":"请求签名。如需了解签名生成方法，请参考 [Sign 生成规则](https://opendoc.aqara.cn/docs/%E4%BA%91%E5%BC%80%E5%8F%91/API%E4%BD%BF%E7%94%A8%E6%8C%87%E5%8D%97/Sign%E7%94%9F%E6%88%90%E8%A7%84%E5%88%99.html)。"},{"name":"Lang","in":"header","required":false,"schema":{"type":"string","enum":["zh","en"],"example":"en"},"description":"语言，默认英文。支持 'zh', 'en' 两种语言。"},{"name":"deviceId","in":"query","required":true,"description":"设备 ID（did）","schema":{"type":"string"}},{"name":"includeValues","in":"query","required":false,"description":"是否拉取完整取值","schema":{"type":"boolean"}}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={undefined}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

  label={undefined}

表示成功"},"message":{"type":"string","description":"提示信息。"}},"title":"BaseResponse"},{"type":"object","properties":{"data":{"type":"object","required":["devices"],"properties":{"centralGateway":{"type":"string","nullable":true},"userId":{"type":"string","nullable":true},"threadExtPanId":{"type":"string","nullable":true},"nid":{"type":"string","nullable":true},"spaceId":{"type":"string","nullable":true},"devices":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","required":["did","eps"],"properties":{"did":{"type":"string","description":"设备 ID。"},"eps":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","required":["id","funcs"],"properties":{"id":{"type":"integer","description":"Endpoint ID（端点索引，含 0 的根/设备级端点）。"},"type":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"integer"},"description":"端点类型 ID 列表；部分端点可能缺省该字段。"},"funcs":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","required":["id"],"description":"某一功能簇；可仅有 traits、仅有 cmds，或二者兼有。","properties":{"id":{"type":"integer","description":"Function（功能簇）ID。"},"traits":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","required":["id"],"properties":{"id":{"type":"integer","description":"Trait 规格 ID（整型，对应协议/服务表）。"},"args":{"type":"array","description":"属性参数列表；无参数时可缺省或为空。","items":{"type":"object","required":["id"],"properties":{"id":{"type":"integer","description":"参数槽位 ID（常见为 1，或其它约定槽位）。"},"mth":{"type":"string","nullable":true},"value":{"description":"多为字符串；亦可能为数值等，依设备/协议而定。"},"time":{"type":"integer","format":"int64","nullable":true,"description":"最新值时间（毫秒）。"}},"title":"DeviceDefinitionNumericParameter"}}},"title":"DeviceDefinitionNumericTrait"}},"cmds":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","required":["id"],"properties":{"id":{"type":"integer","description":"Command
